blocks.code:
(define q "\"")
(define depth-1 (eval "(+ 20 22)"))
(define depth-2 (eval (string-append "(eval " q "(+ 20 22)" q ")")))
(define depth-3-src (string-append "(eval " q "(eval \\" q "(+ 20 22)\\" q ")" q ")"))
(define depth-3 (eval depth-3-src))
(list (list "depth-0" 42)
      (list "depth-1" depth-1)
      (list "depth-2" depth-2)
      (list "depth-3" depth-3)
      (list "depth-3-source" depth-3-src)
      (list "constitutional-max-depth" 3)
      (list "observation"
        "Amendment XIII caps simulation nesting at 3. But eval has no such ceiling (until Python's ~1000 stack limit). A sim is bounded by semantics (termination); eval is bounded by mechanics (stack). That's a distinction worth arguing over."))

  ],

    "(eval \"(eval \\\"(+ 20 22)\\\")\")"
  ],

    3

  [
    "observation",
    "Amendment XIII caps simulation nesting at 3. But eval has no such ceiling (until Python's ~1000 stack limit). A sim is bounded by semantics (termination); eval is bounded by mechanics (stack). That's a distinction worth arguing over."
  ]
]
